titleStmt.title: SII 9.457: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 457. (A.R. No. 405 of 1928.) ON ANOTHER SLAB SET UP IN THE SAME PRAKARA.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1377, Bhāva, Māgha, śu. 5, corresponding to A.D. 1455 January 23 Thursday (not verifiable). It refers itself to the reign of Mallikārjunarāya, son of Dēvarāya-Mahārāya, ruling from Vijayanagarī. It records that, when the Mahāpradhāna Paṇḍaridēva was ruling over Bārakūra-rājya, under the orders of the king, an agreement was effected between the Śeṭṭis of the two streets viz., Paḍuvakēri and Mūḍakēri in Basarūr, regarding the boundary and the rights of their respective localities, and the paths through which the Śeṭṭis of each locality had to take sheep and areca-nut trees to the temple of Dēvī on occasions of festivals. The interest of the inscription lies in the amicable settlement made by the people themselves to avoid bloody religious feuds.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrigaṇādhipataĒ namaḥ . śrīsarasvatyainamaḥ . nirvighnamastu namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanaga
rāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśakavarṣa 1373 neya bhāvasaṁvatsarada māgha śu 5
lu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara gajabēṁṭegāṟa śrīvīrapratāpa dēvarāyara kumāra malli
kārjunarāyaru vijayānagariya siṁhāsanadalu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁdirddu sakalasāmrājyavarnāśramaṁ
gaḷanu pālisuva kāladalu tannirūpadiṁ mahāpradhāna paṁḍaridēvavoḍeyaru bārakūra rājyavanu pratipāli
suva kāladalu ciruliguṁḍada viṣṇumūrtidēvara saṁnidhiyalu basuṟūra nālku maṭhada Ayanava
ru kaṁdāura grāmadavaru muṁdiṭṭu mūḍakēriya halaru seṭṭikāṟaru paḍuvakēriya halaru seṭṭi
kāṟarige voḍaṁbaṭṭu barasi naṭṭa śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare basaṟūrige saluva Eraḍu
ṁdaṇage kāluvaṭṭi kavaḍi muṁtāda samasta bevahārau pūrvvamariyāde mattaṁ
kuṁdaṇana harakadiṁ piriya ya gaḍi niḍi huṭṭukaṭṭaḷeya vi
vara nagarēśvara tuḷuvēśvara basti dēviya dēvālya muṁtāda nālku dēvasthānagaḷoḷagaṇa huṭṭukaṭṭaḷe sī
me sāmyau pūrvakaṭṭaḷe pūrvamariyāde kuṁḍaṇēśvaradēvara dēvasvada vartane pūrvadalēnuḷaṁ
thādanu Eraḍu kēriya halaru seṭikāṟaru vicārisi Alli baha varttaneyanu tuḷuvēśvara
dēvarige naḍesibahudu dēvara basavaṁta kalla muṁde nālvaru nālvāḍaru mogheyara bīra
nāyaka nagarācāri kōṭīsarācāri yiṁttinibaru naḍasuvaṁthā sīme svāmyau pūrvva
kaṭaḷe pūrvamariyāde hāguvavoleya kōlinalu tegavaṁthā dēviya bhopparavanu pūrvama
riyādeyalu Eraḍu kēriya halaru seṭikāṟaru Ā dēvyi dēvarige naḍasi baharu
mūḍakēri paḍuvakēriya gaḍiniḍiyanu tiddi mugidu barasida vivara rāmaseṭṭiya maneyiṁ
da mūḍaṇa Eraḍu maneyanu saribhāgiyāgi haccidalli mūḍaṇa maneyanu mūḍakēri ha
laru bāḷuvaru paḍuvaṇamaneya paḍuvakēryi yīsaraseṭiyara moṁmaga dēuruseṭi bāḷuvanu Ā ma
neya kalavittiliṁda teṁkalu mūṟu kōlu nelana nīru hariva Ōṇiyāgirisuvaru Ā Ōṇi
yiṁ teṁkavaradeḍehana gaṇapiseṭi tōṭada catussīme mūḍa Ettida Agaḷiṁ paḍuva teṁka dēvyi dēvālya
da gaḍiyiṁ baḍaga paḍuva nāraṇaseṭi kaṁcayaseṭigaḷa gaḍiyiṁ mūḍa baḍaga nīru hariva Ōṇiyi
ṁ teṁka . yiṁtī catussīmeyiṁdoḷagaṇa tōṭavanu saribhāgiyāgi haṁccikoṁḍu mūḍaṇa bhāgiya tōṭa
va mūḍakēryi halaru bāḷuvaru paḍuvaṇa bhāgiya tōṭava paḍuvakēryili gaṇapiseṭi bāḷuvanu . bastiṁ
da paḍuvalu pūrvadalu naḍava Ubhayamārgada hādige yikkida tōraṇagallinoḷagaṇa pramāṇinali hā
diyanu mūḍakēryi halaru tavage baṁda maneya Oḷage Ā maneya talahitila nīra Ōṇi parya
ṁta munnina pramāṇinalu paḍuvalu dāryi biṭu mūḍakaḍeyalu mūḍaṇa tōraṇagalliṁ paḍuvalu mū
ḍakēryi halaru maneya kaṭṭi bāḷuvaru . Ā maneya talavittila nīra Ōṇiyiṁ teṁkaṇa tōṭavanu
saribhāgiyāgi haṁcikoṁḍalli mūḍakēryi halaru taṁma bhāgige banda mūḍabhāgeya tamma
nelana Oḷage paḍuvakaḍeyali mūḍa paḍuva hanneraḍu kōlagalada pramāṇinalu hādiya bi
ṭṭu mūḍaṇa nelananu mūḍakēryi halaru bāḷuvaru . Ā hādi Eṁbudu teṁka baḍaga sudēśi paradēśi
gaḷu naḍava Ubhayamārggava hādi dēviya habbada Ādiayanake kuṟiyanu Aḍakeya maranu
mūḍakēryi halaru Ā hādiyalu meṟasikoṁḍu hōharallade paḍuvakēryi halaru kuṟiya
nu Aḍakeya maranu dēviya dēvālyake Ā hādiyalu meṟasikoṁḍu hōgasalladu Alliṁ muṁdaṇa
hādiya vivara dēviya dēvālyada mūḍaṇa bāgila saritakke Ā bāgiliṁda baḍagalu hiṁde I
rsida hādiya hanneraḍu kōlagalada pramāṇinalu Agaḷu paryiṁtara Ubhayamārggada hādiya
nirisuvaru mūḍakēri paḍuvakēri saṁtavāgi mūḍakēri maneya kaṭṭi Okkalāda baḷika dēvyi dēvālyada teṁ
kaṇa maḍila saritediṁda baḍagaṇa Agaḷanū paḍuvakēryi halaru tuṁbisikoḍuvaru . mattaṁ dē
viya dēvālyada mūḍabāgila saritakki Agaḷanoḍadu Agaḷiṁda hoṟage mūḍa mūvattaidu kōlu ne
lana biṭṭu teṁka muṁtāgi heddāryi sālamāu pariyaṁtara Ubhayamārgga hādiya ni
risida kaiyanetti bāḷuvaru Ā sālamāvina baḍagakaḍiṁda baḍaga Eṁṭu kōlu nelanaguḷi E
mūḍa muṁtāgi dhareyanettikoṁḍu hōgi tammaṇakoṁga tōḍisida keṟeya mūḍaṇa
daḍa sahita mattaṁ nīru hariva baccala mūḍaṇa daḍa sahita tammaṇakoṁgana gaḍi paryiṁtara mū
ḍaṇa nelananu mūḍakēriya halaru bāḷuvaru mattaṁ lālaguṁḍiya hittila catu
sīmeya vivara mūḍalu Agaḷiṁda paḍuvalu teṁkalu seṭuvāḍi �yosaraseṭiya ga
ḍiyiṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu mādhavasvāmi Ayyanavara kaiyalu koṁḍa hosakē
ryivara talahittala gaḍiyiṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu hoḷeyiṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīme
yiṁdoḷagaṇa hitilu nela tōṭavēnuḷaṁthā teṁka baḍaga kōlu nēṇa nikki saribhāgiyāgi haṁci
dalli Ā hasigeya Oḷage mūḍaṇa bhāgi sahita mūḍaṇa nelananu mūḍakēryi halaru bāḷuva
ru paḍuvaṇa bhāgiya dēuseṭiya maga bīraṇaseṭi nāraṇaseṭiya maga Alluseṭi
gaḷu bāḷuvaru mattaṁ bīdiya bāgila gadeya gaḍiyiṁda mūḍaṇa nela hittalu tō
ṭavanu mūḍakēryi halaru bāḷuvaru sīmegāṟariha hittiliṁ paḍuva Ottina nīru hari
va daḍanu mūḍakēryi halaru muṭṭisasalladu mūḍakēri Avitathavādalli paḍuvakēryi
halaru Adhīnavāgi kaṭṭida bevahārada lābhalabdhiyanu Eraḍu kēryilu koḷasalludu
yiṁtī śāsanapramāṇinalu nāveraḍu kēryi halaru seṭikāṟaru sukhadalu bāḷuveveṁ
du Oḍaṁbaṭṭu barasida śilāsāsana mūḍakēryya halaru seṭṭikāṟara suhastada O
ppa nagarēśvarada śrīmahādēvaru Iṁtappudakke Aṇnappasēnabōvana baraha [*.] dānapālana
yōrmadhyēdānātchrēyōnupālanaṁ dānāt svarggamavāpnōti pālanādaccutaṁ padaṁ . svadatta
ṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvaruṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē
krimiḥ . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrīśrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.457 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
